Back to Meetings
1999November 8, 1999

🇺🇸 New Orleans, LA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, New Orleans, United States, November 8, 1999 -- November 18, 1999

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1999-11-new-orleans-la-usa

19 Resolutions

438Plenary
Investigate impact and benefits of the new EXPRESS document
SC4 requests its WGs to investigate the impact and benefits of the new Express document (see resolution C) and to put forward NWIs for revising parts, as appropriate.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
437Plenary
Split ISO 10303-27 into two parts and publish as Technical Specifications
SC4 resolves that the technical content of ISO 10303-27 shall be published as two separate parts and as Technical Specifications rather than as a single part as a Draft International Standard. Conf...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
436Plenary
Allow SC 4 projects to enter Stage 3 ballot using HTML format
SC4 resolves to allow SC4 projects to enter their Stage 3 ballot with drafts documented using HTML.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
435Plenary
Approve Christian Donges as WG 12 Deputy Convener
SC4 approves Christian Donges as Deputy Convener of ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 12 "Common Resources".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
434Plenary
Invite SC 1 WG 7 to jointly specify process flow requirements
SC4 invites SC 1 WG 7 to work jointly with SC4 to specify these requirements.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
433Plenary
Authorize ISO 10303-518 Project Leader to prepare DIS document
SC4 authorizes the Project Leader for ISO 10303-518 to prepare the document as a DIS.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
432Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with INCOSE and appoint David Oliver
SC4 approves a Category A liaison with INCOSE, appoints Mr. David Oliver as the liaison officer, and requests that the SC4 secretary confirm this liaison with the ISO Central Secretariat.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
431Plenary
Authorize Bernd Wenzel as SC 4 representative to OMG
SC4 authorizes Bernd Wenzel to act as the representative of SC4 in his contacts with OMG regarding modelling language requirements.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
430Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with PLCS, Inc. and appoint John Dunford
SC4 accepts the request of PLCS, Inc. to establish a Category liaison from PLCS, Inc. to SC4 and appoints John Dunford as liaison officer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
429Plenary
Reconfirm conveners for WG 11, WG 8, and WG 2
SC4 reconfirms the following conveners: * David Price as Deputy Convener WG 11 * Christophe Viel WG 11 * Jean Jacques Michel WG 8 * Gerd Ehinger WG 2
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
428Plenary
Amend Organization Handbook regarding balloting of Technical Specifications
SC4 approves the following amendments to the Organization Handbook (changes in italics): Clause 2.1: * Amend the current text: 30 Committee Stage: Consensus is achieved on a Committee Draft (CD) or...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
427Plenary
Identify actions to migrate SC 4 to electronic balloting
SC4 instructs the Secretariat to identify actions necessary to migrate to a totally electronic operation of SC4 as soon as feasible and to prepare any necessary proposals for approval at Melbourne.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
426Plenary
Update Minor Revision process in SC 4 Handbook
SC4 requests the Secretary to make the following changes to Clause 3.1.3 Revision of the SC4 Handbook. 1. Replace Clause 3.1.3 with the following text: A revision to an International Standard resul...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
425Plenary
Support continuation of joint OMG/SC 4 harmonization activity
SC4 recognizes and supports the continuation of the harmonization activity by the OMG Manufacturing Domain Task Force and members of the SC4 community. SC4 requests that members disseminate informa...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
424Plenary
Ballot EXPRESS amendment to support modularization as DIS
SC4 resolves that the proposed amendment (WG 11N084 as amended) to ISO 10303-11(1994) EXPRESS to support modularization be balloted as a DIS and incorporated in a new document with Technical Corrig...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
423Plenary
Request retention of 1994 editions of ISO 10303-41, -42, -43, and -44
SC4 requests that the ISO Central Secretariat retain the 1994 editions of ISO 10303-41, -42, -43, and -44 in order to support parts 104, 204, 205, 209, 213 and 518 and the corresponding ATSs.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
422Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for ISO 10303 projects
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |10303-11 Edition 2 |Don Sanderson | |10303-325 |...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 thanks Michael Endres Jr. for his efforts as Deputy Convener WG 12.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to express their appreciation: * To the US for hosting the New Orleans SC4 meeting. A special thanks goes to US PRO, Chuck Stark, and his staff for their assistance and support * To the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
